acceptance_criteria: Preserve every relevant user request and applicable assistant response with immutable provenance and stable identifiers.
Inventory, hash, safely extract, index, reconcile, and preserve every accessible source without inventing missing metadata.
Map every extracted request to canonical requirements while retaining all source pointers, conflicts, supersession, and gaps.
Register every module with owner, contracts, dependencies, state, tests, evidence, cost, security, and rollback.
Register all requested features with target placement, acceptance criteria, implementation state, and proof path.
Register callable functions, handlers, routes, inputs, outputs, errors, tests, and runtime state.
Map Skills to one primary owner, triggers, inputs, outputs, tests, evidence, and lifecycle state.
Register tools, apps, APIs, MCPs, webhooks, connectors, scopes, health checks, costs, fallbacks, and revoke paths.
Route deterministic, local, free, lowest-cost, and premium models by verified capability, privacy, latency, reliability, and cost.
Operate a bounded hierarchical agent council with explicit permissions, quotas, retries, memory, tests, safe stop, and independent verification.
Implement workflows with dependency graphs, state, idempotency, retries, checkpoints, queues, dead letters, evidence, and rollback.
Use branch, CI, review, staging, canary, production, monitoring, rollback, and owner-acceptance gates.
Use non-destructive branches, commits, pull requests, deterministic CI, security scans, review, and rollback.
Enforce zero trust, least privilege, scoped identities, vault-backed secret references, supply-chain scans, audit, and incident response.
Require explicit approval for credentials, billing, destructive actions, external communications, money movement, live trading, production, and regulated actions.
Maintain source-to-runtime traceability, hashes, tests or waivers, discrepancy records, proof states, and independent verification.
Expose truthful progress, traffic lights, blockers, exact next actions, approvals, costs, evidence, and rollback in the Command Centre.
Maintain working, episodic, semantic, procedural, project, and audit memory with provenance, correction, retention, resume, export, and rollback.
Default to verified cached, deterministic, local, native, open, and free routes before justified paid escalation; track hard ceilings and unit cost.
Support governed self-build, self-repair, self-update, scaffolding, simulation, testing, canary, promotion, and rollback.
Separate immutable raw sources, normalized records, domain data, memory, evidence, telemetry, and retention policies.
Use official-first research, source expansion, claim extraction, contradiction/freshness analysis, question generation, and evidence packs.
Provide role cards, SOPs, checklists, failure playbooks, simulations, competency tests, permission ceilings, and retraining triggers.
Every UI control must declare purpose, inputs, handler, approval, state, output, evidence, failure, retry, rollback, and next step.
Define RPO/RTO, backups, restore tests, replay, degraded mode, failover, rollback ownership, and continuity packs.
Maintain research-only XRP/HBAR intelligence, catalysts, on-chain/market evidence, probabilities, discrepancy logs, and anti-hype controls.
Keep strategy research, backtesting, walk-forward validation, paper trading, risk, and broker/exchange integration owner-gated before live execution.
Maintain isolated finance, Xero, tax, trust, SMSF, invoice, cash-flow, portfolio, audit, and professional-review workflows.
Keep health workflows privacy-safe, evidence-tiered, non-diagnostic, consent-controlled, and professionally gated.
Maintain property, buyer, lead, heritage, land-tax, valuation, sale, and capture-only promotion workflows.
Maintain automotive catalogue, fitment, workshop, parts, customer, supplier, repair, billing, and robotics workflows.
Ingest copied links and media, transcribe, OCR, verify claims, preserve evidence, and route outputs to modules.
Discover, verify, rank, blueprint, build, and monitor lawful AI-enabled income opportunities without guaranteeing returns.
Maintain food, water, shelter, emergency, off-grid, seed, and physical preparedness intelligence.
Keep frequency, Rife, PEMF, PBM, scalar, plasma, and related claims evidence-tiered and health-gated.
Maintain source-first residence requirements, architect briefs, visual references, decisions, gaps, and future updates.
Maintain grow, hydroponics, DWC, nutrients, seeds, environment, safety, and compliance requirements.
Maintain immigration, citizenship, fines, contracts, personal administration, and professional legal review workflows.
